candidate_definitions.text: Postgres Foreign Data Wrapper development framework in Rust.

`Wrappers` is a development framework for Postgres Foreign Data Wrappers ([FDW](https://wiki.postgresql.org/wiki/Foreign_data_wrappers)), written in Rust. Its goal is to make Postgres FDW development easier while keeping Rust language's modern capabilities, such as high performa…
